---
title: "Consultancy"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css">
---

I provide analytical, spatial, and research expertise to support evidence-based decision-making in public health, humanitarian, and development contexts. My consultancy work focuses on data management, geographic analysis, impact evaluation, and technical research support.

::: callout-important
-   **Upskilling teams in geospatial analysis**

-   **Designing and conducting quantitative or mixed methods research**

-   **Data analysis for research and public health projects**

-   **Developing interactive dashboards to communicate research findings or other forms of data**
:::

**Key areas of experience include:**

<i class="fa-solid fa-file-csv fa-2x"></i> **Data management:** Designing and implementing systems to improve data quality and streamline workflows.

<i class="fa-solid fa-location-dot fa-2x"></i> **GIS training:** Delivering practical GIS training to build organisational capacity.

<i class="fa-solid fa-magnifying-glass-chart fa-2x"></i> **Impact evaluations:** Supporting programme assessments and evidence of effectiveness.

<i class="fa-solid fa-bicycle fa-2x"></i> **Geographic accessibility modelling:** Analysing service access and coverage using spatial modelling.

<i class="fa-solid fa-file-pdf fa-2x"></i> **Technical report writing:** Producing clear, actionable reports for programmes and policy.

<i class="fa-solid fa-laptop-file fa-2x"></i> **Survey data collection:** Designing instruments, managing fieldwork, and ensuring high-quality data.
